atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to insert Tailwind's base, components, utilities and variants styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use @apply to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the @layer directive to tell Tailwind which layer a custom utility belongs to.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Generate responsive, hover, focus, active, and other variants of your own utilities.

atDirectives.name: @responsive
atDirectives.description: Generate responsive variants of your own classes.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: The @screen directive allows you to create media queries that reference your breakpoints.
